hits.positionName: Retail Display & Planogram Associate – Columbia, SC
hits.resumeText:
Retail Merchandise Associate @ Crossmark
I have extensive customer service experience and I am able to utilize this experience every day. I have been working in my current merchandising position for 9 years and have great relationships with all of my clients. I have solid knowledge in reading planograms and have even been a mentor for new hires.
To obtain a position with an established company that will allow me to apply and utilize my skills and provide new and challenging opportunities. My experience will ensure continued stability and professionalism within your company.
Retail Merchandise Associate Perform in-store merchandising Service activities such as merchandising projects, planogram maintenance, overhead organization and display/signage maintenance designed to enhance the customer experience Execute merchandising Created floor move plans to better execute during the remodel Lead of teams for extensive store remodels in ULTA Beauty locations Build and maintain strong relationships with store associates and provide superior customer service to both internal and external customers Additional responsibilities with this employer Project Coordinator Supervised up to 20 team members Coordinated complete store remodel of a different Walgreens location each week for 4 months Always finished ahead of schedule Worked closely with the store managers at each location Merchandise Execution Associate Perform in-store merchandising Service activities such as merchandising projects, planogram maintenance, overhead organization and display/signage maintenance designed to enhance the customer experience Execute merchandising strategies and ensure product is displayed correctly to drive sales and maximize inventory turns Work in teams with on-site supervision, and provide service to multiple departments in stores Execute approved general bay service, tasking, projects and resets safely, accurately and efficiently. Build and maintain strong relationships with store associates and provide superior customer service to both internal and external customers Owner Operator Purchased and remodeled local restaurant Hired and managed all employees Maintained product inventory Processed payroll Complete management of restaurant Account Billing Specialist Maintained assigned coop account Processed and billed all incoming staking sheets Monitored receivable accounts Handled all account correspondence Ensured proper revenue to accounts Project Coordinator Assisted project manager in all aspects of project Researched and obtained pertinent cell tower, zoning, leasing, and environmental information Created status reports for clients viewing on database Organized conference meetings with clients Managed all meeting minutes Coordinated travel itinerary for project manager Additional assignments for this position: Site Handler Scanned and organized client files for further review Created site information folders for use by site acquisition specialists Routed all call on multi line phone system Coordinated travel arrangements for Senior manager Processed incoming and outgoing mail Processed Fed Ex deliveries Office facilitator Owner Operator Managed daily operations Handled hiring and training of all staff Maintained inventory levels to ensure efficient daily operations Managed and maintained A/P and A/R accounts Customer Service Rep/Billing Specialist Answered front office multi line phones Implemented and maintained network scanning system Coordinated Microsoft training classes for 40 employees Carried out extensive research for resolution for proper billing of patients and insurance companies Generated corrected HCFA claim forms for proper billing Processed data entry of daily cash receipts and deposits Assisted in streamline processes for updating patient demographics

hits.resumeText:
Traveling Merchandiser @ Footprint Solutions
Traveling Merchandiser Merchandising I do mystery shops and audit for select locations making sure stores and restaurants are meeting standards. Independent contractors jobs Merchandiser I do small merchandising reset and inventory management at select locations around the country. Merchandiser I do store resets at select locations around the country. Retail Merchandiser I do travel store resets at select locations around the country. Travel Agent Traveling Hippie Care is a Travel Agency that I own. I'm here to give everyone great deals on vacation or work Travel. As an agent I truly want to give you the best experience possible. As my company is growing I appreciate everyone along the way. CBD Representative/Influencer Delivery Driver Prep food for the day and deliver the food as well. Influencer I go to stores to shop for customer and deliver it to them. RGIS Inventory Specialist I count at different stores all there inventory. Wendys Crew Member Cashier And Cook Direct care worker I took care of disabled people. Cleaning and Washing dishes. I'd go to the store and do everything they needed.
